title: "Plan Your Visit - Pike Place Market"

# Plan Your Visit

The heart and soul of Seattle since 1907. Start planning your Market Day!

[Home](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/) › [About Pike Place Market](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/about-pike-place-market/) › [Plan Your Visit]{.breadcrumb_last aria-current="page"}

#  \*\* Important Traffic Alert \*\* {#important-traffic-alert style="text-align: center;"}

## Limited Vehicle Access on Pike Place -- Starts 10am daily {#limited-vehicle-access-on-pike-place-starts-10am-daily .column__heading style="color: #1f1f1f"}

<div>

[Vehicle access to Pike Place is limited during select daytime hours as part of a pilot program launched by the Pike Place Market PDA, in partnership with the Seattle Department of Transportation and City of Seattle leadership. The goal is to enhance safety and accessibility for pedestrians, vendors, and visitors.]{olk-copy-source="MessageBody"}

</div>

<div>

With the 2026 summer season ahead and an [[estimated 750,000 visitors](https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cascadepbs.org%2Fnews%2F2025%2F05%2Fwa-lawmakers-approve-funding-2026-world-cup-matches-seattle%2F&data=05%7C02%7CMya.Acosta%40pikeplacemarket.org%7C3e1832c627c0431d23eb08de5f796621%7C48d19592308741cbb841a22af0094403%7C0%7C0%7C639053172198589299%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=l5hDtMt2nEbphpZmZz%2Fagm7anQoBkIpN%2BJwxij4SwvE%3D&reserved=0 "Original URL: https://www.cascadepbs.org/news/2025/05/wa-lawmakers-approve-funding-2026-world-cup-matches-seattle/. Click or tap if you trust this link."){auth="NotApplicable" linkindex="5"}]{.underline} expected in Seattle for the World Cup, maintaining a safe and accessible Market remains a top priority. Extending the pilot through summer will help the PDA better evaluate how limited vehicle access affects Pike Place during the peak season and will help guide long-term traffic management decisions.

</div>

<div>

**Note to Local Shoppers:** Pike Place is fully open to vehicle traffic every day **before 10 am and after 4 pm**, making it easy to pop in for a quick stop, early shopping run, or vendor pickup. Vehicles can remain on Pike Place for **30-minute durations** during the early morning and early evening hours.

</div>

Click the button below to learn more about the limited-access pilot and get directions to our parking garage.

[Learn More](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/about-pike-place-market/plan-your-visit/pike-place-limited-vehicle-access/){.btn .btn-rounded rel="noopener" target="_blank"}

## Start Planning Your Market Day!

Nestled between Seattle's stunning skyline and Puget Sound is Pike Place Market. We were established in 1907, and have been a beloved public market featuring small independent businesses, local farmers, artists, craftspeople, and buskers for over one hundred years and counting!

To help you discover all our 500 small businesses, we created a trip planner tool. With this tool, you can browse our [Market Directory](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/), adding businesses and Market attractions to your day. Then you can name, organize and share your Market days with friends and family. Start planning!

[Plan Your Market Trip](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/my-itinerary/){.btn .btn-rounded rel="noopener"}

 

![](https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/21053810/market_trip-screenshot-pike_place-market-2.jpg){.alignnone .wp-image-10616 decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" height="438" sizes="(max-width: 350px) 100vw, 350px" srcset="https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/21053810/market_trip-screenshot-pike_place-market-2.jpg 1343w, https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/21053810/market_trip-screenshot-pike_place-market-2-240x300.jpg 240w, https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/21053810/market_trip-screenshot-pike_place-market-2-818x1024.jpg 818w, https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/21053810/market_trip-screenshot-pike_place-market-2-768x961.jpg 768w, https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/21053810/market_trip-screenshot-pike_place-market-2-1227x1536.jpg 1227w" width="350"}

## Where is Pike Place Market?

Pike Place Market stretches across a nine-acre historic district. From 1st Avenue to Western Avenue, east to west, and Virginia Street to just past Pike Street, north to south.

[Download our Visitor Guide](https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/11155313/MB_PPM_Visitor-Guide_CI_03-12-24-printable-TS.pdf){.btn .btn-rounded rel="noopener" target="_blank"}

#### [Driving here?]{style="color: #a6192e;"}

[Learn about our parking garage](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/parking-directions/){style="font-family: Roboto;"}

#### [Walking here?]{style="color: #a6192e;"}

[Learn about transportation options or walking directions](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/parking-directions/#publictransportation){style="font-family: Roboto;"}

## Hours: Open Daily

Every day is different in the Market but most of Pike Place Market is active from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. with some of our restaurants staying open until midnight or later. Pike Place Market is also open 7 days a week, closed only on Thanksgiving and Christmas Day.

#### [General Hours]{style="color: #a6192e;"}

[Breakfast](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/22-breakfast-spots-at-pike-place-market/): 7 a.m.\
[Fresh Produce](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?category=fresh-produce) & [Seafood](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?category=fish-market): 7 a.m.\
[Crafts Market](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?category=crafts-market): 11 a.m. -- 4 p.m.\
[Farm Tables](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?category=farmers-market): 9 a.m. -- 4 p.m.\
[Artisanal Food Program](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-programs-events/artisan-prepared-foods-program/): 11 a.m. -- 4 p.m. (Fri -- Sun)

 

#### [Merchant Building Hours]{style="color: #a6192e;"}

[Open daily](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?open=true): 9 a.m. -- 7 p.m.\
[Restrooms](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/map/): 8:30 a.m. -- 6 p.m. (North restroom open until 7 p.m.)\
[Restaurants](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?category=restaurants): 7 a.m. -- 2 a.m.; varies\
[Secret Garden](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/vendor/secret-garden/): 9:30 a.m. -- 5 p.m.

[**Tip:** Click the button below to see who is currently open. Also, tap the "See Who's Open" button in the upper left corner of our website! ]{style="color: #a6192e;"}

[See Who's Open](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/market-directory/?open=true){.btn .btn-rounded rel="noopener"}

 

## Guide Your Way Through the Market!

Explore Pike Place Market in a whole new way with our interactive Market Map! This map gives you point-to-point directions offering a pathway to your destination.

With a few clicks, you can have step-by-step directions leading you to any Market business, restroom, ATM, Market attraction, and more.

Our 10-level, 9-acre Market has never been easier to navigate. Your destination awaits you, start exploring!

[Market Map](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/map/){.btn .btn-rounded rel="noopener"}

[![](https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/21024520/market_map-pike_place_market-751x1373-1-560x1024.jpg){.alignnone .wp-image-18374 decoding="async" height="548" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" srcset="https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/21024520/market_map-pike_place_market-751x1373-1-560x1024.jpg 560w, https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/21024520/market_map-pike_place_market-751x1373-1-164x300.jpg 164w, https://images.pikeplacemarket.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/21024520/market_map-pike_place_market-751x1373-1.jpg 751w" width="300"}](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/map/)

[](https://www.pikeplacemarket.org/visitor-faq/){target=""}

## Explore Pike Place Market

Pike Place Market serves as Seattle's largest incubator of small, independent businesses. It is a vibrant neighborhood comprised of 220+ independently owned shops and restaurants, 180+ craftspeople, 70+ farmers, 60+ permitted buskers, and 450+ residents in affordable housing. Plus, 5 social services and one foundation that helps our diverse community thrive!

Explore our community below!
